list.name: pair
list.label: Pair
list.definition: SELECT id as __value, canonical as __text FROM pairs WHERE is_enabled = true ORDER BY canonical

options.content:
## Detection vs Execution Timeline

**DETECTION TIME** (opportunities table):
- `detected_at`: When spread first exceeded threshold
- `spread_bps`: CEX-DEX price difference at detection
- `anchor_mid`, `dex_mid`: Prices at detection time

**EXECUTION TIME** (opportunities + executions tables):
- `estimated_profit_usd`: Calculated by quoter at execution decision time (fresher prices)
- `estimated_slippage_bps`, `estimated_gas_usd`: Quoter estimates
- `created_at` (executions): When trade was submitted
- `realized_pnl_usd`: Actual P&L after trade confirmed

**Time lag**: Detection → Execution decision → Transaction confirmed (typically 100-2000ms lag)

**Key insight**: `spread_bps` is from detection, but `estimated_profit_usd` uses fresher prices at execution time. This dashboard shows how predictions degrade over time.

panels.title: DETECTION TIME: Spread (bps) - from raw CEX/DEX delta

targets.rawSql: SELECT o.detected_at as time, o.spread_bps, p.canonical || ' (' || o.chain::text || ')' as metric FROM opportunities o JOIN pairs p ON o.pair_id = p.id WHERE o.detected_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR o.pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${chain}' = 'all' OR o.chain::text = '${chain}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR o.strategy = '${strategy}') AND o.status IN ('submitted', 'filled') ORDER BY time

panels.title: EXECUTION TIME: Estimated Profit (USD) - from quoter at exec decision

targets.rawSql: SELECT o.detected_at as time, o.estimated_profit_usd, p.canonical || ' (' || o.chain::text || ')' as metric FROM opportunities o JOIN pairs p ON o.pair_id = p.id WHERE o.detected_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR o.pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${chain}' = 'all' OR o.chain::text = '${chain}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR o.strategy = '${strategy}') AND o.status IN ('submitted', 'filled') AND o.estimated_profit_usd IS NOT NULL ORDER BY time

SELECT e.created_at as time, o.estimated_profit_usd as value, 'Estimated (at execution)' as metric FROM executions e JOIN opportunities o ON e.opportunity_id = o.id WHERE e.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR e.pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${chain}' = 'all' OR e.chain::text = '${chain}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR e.strategy = '${strategy}') AND o.estimated_profit_usd IS NOT NULL ORDER BY time

SELECT e.created_at as time, e.realized_pnl_usd as value, 'Realized (actual)' as metric FROM executions e WHERE e.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR e.pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${chain}' = 'all' OR e.chain::text = '${chain}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR e.strategy = '${strategy}') AND e.realized_pnl_usd IS NOT NULL ORDER BY time

SELECT e.created_at as time, (e.realized_pnl_usd - o.estimated_profit_usd) as error, p.canonical as metric FROM executions e JOIN opportunities o ON e.opportunity_id = o.id JOIN pairs p ON e.pair_id = p.id WHERE e.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR e.pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${chain}' = 'all' OR e.chain::text = '${chain}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR e.strategy = '${strategy}') AND e.realized_pnl_usd IS NOT NULL AND o.estimated_profit_usd IS NOT NULL ORDER BY time

SELECT (e.realized_pnl_usd - o.estimated_profit_usd) as error FROM executions e JOIN opportunities o ON e.opportunity_id = o.id WHERE e.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR e.pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${chain}' = 'all' OR e.chain::text = '${chain}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR e.strategy = '${strategy}') AND e.realized_pnl_usd IS NOT NULL AND o.estimated_profit_usd IS NOT NULL

panels.title: Mean Prediction Error
panels.description: Average difference between realized P&L and estimated profit (negative = overestimation)

targets.rawSql: SELECT AVG(e.realized_pnl_usd - o.estimated_profit_usd) as value FROM executions e JOIN opportunities o ON e.opportunity_id = o.id WHERE e.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR e.pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${chain}' = 'all' OR e.chain::text = '${chain}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR e.strategy = '${strategy}') AND e.realized_pnl_usd IS NOT NULL AND o.estimated_profit_usd IS NOT NULL

SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY (e.realized_pnl_usd - o.estimated_profit_usd)) as value FROM executions e JOIN opportunities o ON e.opportunity_id = o.id WHERE e.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR e.pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${chain}' = 'all' OR e.chain::text = '${chain}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR e.strategy = '${strategy}') AND e.realized_pnl_usd IS NOT NULL AND o.estimated_profit_usd IS NOT NULL

SELECT STDDEV(e.realized_pnl_usd - o.estimated_profit_usd) as value FROM executions e JOIN opportunities o ON e.opportunity_id = o.id WHERE e.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR e.pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${chain}' = 'all' OR e.chain::text = '${chain}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR e.strategy = '${strategy}') AND e.realized_pnl_usd IS NOT NULL AND o.estimated_profit_usd IS NOT NULL

panels.title: Overestimation Rate (%)
panels.description: Percentage of trades where estimated profit exceeded realized P&L

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE e.realized_pnl_usd < o.estimated_profit_usd) / COUNT(*)::numeric, 1) ELSE 0 END as value FROM executions e JOIN opportunities o ON e.opportunity_id = o.id WHERE e.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR e.pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${chain}' = 'all' OR e.chain::text = '${chain}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR e.strategy = '${strategy}') AND e.realized_pnl_usd IS NOT NULL AND o.estimated_profit_usd IS NOT NULL

SELECT e.created_at as time, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e.created_at - o.detected_at)) * 1000 as latency_ms, p.canonical as metric FROM executions e JOIN opportunities o ON e.opportunity_id = o.id JOIN pairs p ON e.pair_id = p.id WHERE e.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR e.pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${chain}' = 'all' OR e.chain::text = '${chain}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR e.strategy = '${strategy}') AND o.detected_at IS NOT NULL ORDER BY time

SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e.created_at - o.detected_at)) * 1000 as latency_ms FROM executions e JOIN opportunities o ON e.opportunity_id = o.id WHERE e.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR e.pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${chain}' = 'all' OR e.chain::text = '${chain}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR e.strategy = '${strategy}') AND o.detected_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT e.created_at as exec_time, p.canonical as pair, o.detected_at as detect_time, ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e.created_at - o.detected_at)) * 1000) as lag_ms, o.spread_bps as detect_spread_bps, o.estimated_profit_usd as est_profit_usd, e.realized_pnl_usd as real_pnl_usd, ROUND(e.realized_pnl_usd - o.estimated_profit_usd, 2) as prediction_error_usd, ROUND(((e.realized_pnl_usd - o.estimated_profit_usd) / NULLIF(o.estimated_profit_usd, 0)) * 100, 1) as error_pct, o.estimated_slippage_bps as est_slip_bps, e.realized_slippage_bps as real_slip_bps, o.estimated_gas_usd as est_gas_usd, e.gas_cost_usd as real_gas_usd FROM executions e JOIN opportunities o ON e.opportunity_id = o.id JOIN pairs p ON e.pair_id = p.id WHERE e.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR e.pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${chain}' = 'all' OR e.chain::text = '${chain}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR e.strategy = '${strategy}') AND e.realized_pnl_usd IS NOT NULL AND o.estimated_profit_usd IS NOT NULL ORDER BY e.created_at DESC LIMIT 100
